start_index.description: The start index of the annotation in the text.

end_index.description: The end index of the annotation in the text.

url.description: The URL cited. Present for url_citation type.

title.description: The title of the cited resource.

file_id.description:
The ID of the cited file. Present for file_citation and
file_path types.

quote.description: The relevant quote from the file.
